title: Tap into trusted Classifieds
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS AND VIDEO -...
bodyText:
Video

GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS AND VIDEO - Classified ads are the only form of advertising that is sought after across the world.


> When you place a classified ad, you get full market coverage - both in print and online!


If you place a classified ad with us, it will appear for 7 days on all Group Editors’ websites, as well as in the edition(s) of the newspaper(s) of your choice.

Our publications:

- www.georgeherald.com
- www.mosselbayadvertiser.com
- www.knysnaplettherald.com
- www.oudtshoorncourant.com
- www.suidkaapforum.com
- www.graafreinetadvertiser.com


> The benefits of Classified adverts


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Print and digital are working hand-in-hand to give you, our clients, total market coverage.Classified adverts are an affordable way to reach a large audience.And best of all, you need not leave your home to place your ad!

So why Classifieds? It is the only form of advertising in the world that is actually sought. People turn to Classifieds in a buying frame of mind. This is a an extremely powerful tool and often underestimated.

Classifieds are categorised, which makes them user-friendly and easy to access.

Did you know Classified ads are also searchable online? How convenient!

Reach a large audienceWith the combination of print and digital, your Classified advert has the potential to reach a very large audience.

Over 32 000 copies of Group Editors publications are distributed every week. This translates to a readership of roughly 121 600 per week!

Online, the audience is even bigger! Our combined websites has an average of 906 682 users per month. And our average monthly page views are well over 1.9 million.

You can’t afford to lose out on this total market coverage opportunity.


> Contact us today to place your Classified advert :-


- E-mail us at [email protected]
- You can call us on 044 874 2424.
- Send a Wapp to 081 800 5423.

Please use reference : Classifieds.


> What works best when you place an ad?


When placing a classified ad, it’s important to know what works and what doesn’t.

Here are a few tips:

- Clearly state exactly what you're offering. Indicate whether you're selling something, offering a service, etc.
- If you're advertising property, start with the area where the property is located, e.g., George city center.
- Make sure you select the appropriate category.
- All good ads should be written to catch the attention of the target market. So, start with a punchline.
- Keep it short! If you grab attention immediately, you'll get results!
- All contact numbers should be correct.
- Ensure that spelling and grammar are accurate.
- Ask someone else's opinion on the ad before placing it.


> How to find a classified ad:


The fact that they are categorized makes it easy for users and advertisers to find what they are looking for.

The infographic below explains step by step how to search for classified ads on our websites.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
